summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgriPOS multibranch inventory and POS system. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with proper authentication, navigation, and data integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires after short period requiring re-login for extended testing

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with real KPI data (revenue: $30, sales: 1, products: 5, customers: 3)
Navigation to all pages (Branches, Products, Inventory, POS, Customers, Sales, Accounting, Settings)
Parent product creation (LAN-250G, Lannate 250g, Box, Cost: 100, Retail: 150)
Repack generation (R Lannate 250g, Sachet, 10 units per parent, Cost: 10, Retail: 15)
Inventory stock adjustment (Parent: 10 units, Repack: 100 units)
Customer creation (Test Customer, retail price scheme)
POS sale completion (2x repack items, $30 total, cash payment)
Sales history display showing completed transactions
POS interface loads with product grid and cart functionality
Real-time data integration between backend and frontend
